title: fix: make qwen-large and qwen-vision free tier
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Freeing the Qwens
gist.blurb: We've unlocked Qwen Large and Qwen Vision for the free tier. Go ahead and throw your biggest prompts and images at them—no Pollen required.
gist.summary: Removed the paid-only restriction from the qwen-large and qwen-vision models, making them accessible to all users on the free tier.
gist.impact: Free tier users can now generate text with Qwen 3.5 Plus and analyze images with Qwen 3 VL Plus without needing Pollen credits.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee handing out free glowing orbs (representing the newly free models) to the Monitor Robot. A 'FREE' sign emphasizes the update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing out glowing free samples to a chunky monitor-head robot. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. The robot's screen shows a happy face. A sign reads 'FREE' in chunky pixel font. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing out glowing free samples to a chunky monitor-head robot. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background.
